name: SIGNL4 Mobile Alerting API
what_it_does: Mobile alerting and incident response platform with REST API — delivering actionable alerts via mobile app, SMS, and voice calls for teams in operations, IT, and industrial IoT environments where reliable mobile notification is critical.
use_cases: Sending critical operational alerts to on-call mobile teams via simple REST API
IoT device and sensor alert routing to field teams with mobile confirmation
IT operations alerting with shift-based duty routing and escalation
Industrial operations alerting for manufacturing and facility management teams
Simple webhook-based alert sending without complex on-call configuration
not_for: Teams needing complex incident management workflows and postmortems
Developer-focused SRE teams (use PagerDuty or Opsgenie)
Organizations needing extensive third-party integration ecosystem
best_when: An operations or industrial team needs reliable mobile alerting with shift management and a simple webhook/REST API that doesn't require developer expertise to configure.
avoid_when: You need complex SRE workflows, postmortem automation, or developer-grade incident management.

auth.notes: Team secret passed in webhook URL path. Simple REST API with team-specific webhook endpoints. API key management per team. Very simple auth model appropriate for operational environments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 month trial; limited free features
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic from $9/user/month; Professional from $14; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-user pricing. Very affordable. Germany-based — strong GDPR compliance. Used in industrial, manufacturing, and operations contexts. Simple pricing without complex add-ons.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Very simple webhook-based alert sending. Rich alert payload format with custom fields. REST API for retrieving alert status. Simple enough for non-developer operations staff to configure.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Alert sending creates new alerts. Alert status queries are idempotent reads. Closing/acknowledging alerts is idempotent — calling multiple times has no additional effect.
known_agent_gotchas: Team secret in URL — treat full webhook URL as sensitive credential
Alert format very flexible — but agents must know expected field names for categories
Duty scheduling must be configured in UI before shift-based routing works
Mobile app required for full functionality — browser fallback limited

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Team secret in URL — simple but less secure than header auth. ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. German company with strong European privacy focus.
